input.question: Do professors with higher academic titles give different grades?

payload.question: Do professors with higher academic titles give different grades?

output.sql:
WITH avg_by_title AS (
  SELECT
    p.academic_title AS academic_title,
    AVG(g.grade) AS avg_grade,
    STDDEV_POP(g.grade) AS grade_stddev,
    AVG(g.grade) - STDDEV_POP(g.grade) AS lower_bound,
    AVG(g.grade) + STDDEV_POP(g.grade) AS upper_bound,
    COUNT(*) AS count_grades
  FROM course_grades g
  JOIN professors p
    ON g.professor_id = p.id
  WHERE p.academic_title IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.academic_title
)
SELECT
  academic_title,
  avg_grade,
  grade_stddev,
  lower_bound,
  upper_bound,
  count_grades
FROM avg_by_title
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;

visualization.title: Average Grade by Professor Academic Title (with ±1 stddev)

payload.sql:
WITH avg_by_title AS (
  SELECT
    p.academic_title AS academic_title,
    AVG(g.grade) AS avg_grade,
    STDDEV_POP(g.grade) AS grade_stddev,
    AVG(g.grade) - STDDEV_POP(g.grade) AS lower_bound,
    AVG(g.grade) + STDDEV_POP(g.grade) AS upper_bound,
    COUNT(*) AS count_grades
  FROM course_grades g
  JOIN professors p
    ON g.professor_id = p.id
  WHERE p.academic_title IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.academic_title
)
SELECT
  academic_title,
  avg_grade,
  grade_stddev,
  lower_bound,
  upper_bound,
  count_grades
FROM avg_by_title
ORDER BY avg_grade DESC;
